Be thorough — look at config files, source files, and any existing philosophical content. Report the full directory tree and key file contents.

65	  {"id":"WI1","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Good judgment starts where certainty starts to crack.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["judgment","certainty","wisdom"]},

67	  {"id":"WI3","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Truth ages well; shortcuts do not.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["truth","shortcut","time"]},
68	  {"id":"WI4","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"The wise mind measures consequence before confidence.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["wisdom","consequence","confidence"]},
69	  {"id":"WI5","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"What is unclear will get expensive.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["clarity","cost","risk"]},
70	  {"id":"WI6","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Humility is an operating constraint, not a mood.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["humility","constraint","law"]},
71	  {"id":"WI7","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"If the witness is weak, the claim must wait.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["witness","claim","wait"]},
72	  {"id":"WI8","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"A clean definition can save a thousand arguments.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["definition","argument","clarity"]},
73	  {"id":"WI9","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"When reality disagrees, update the story.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["reality","update","truth"]},
74	  {"id":"WI10","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Noise often arrives dressed as urgency.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["noise","urgency","discipline"]},
75	  {"id":"WI11","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"The stronger the model, the more honestly it states its limits.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["model","limit","honesty"]},
76	  {"id":"WI12","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Precision is compassion for the next reader.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["precision","compassion","reader"]},
77	  {"id":"WI13","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"What you cannot explain clearly, do not ship proudly.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["explain","ship","clarity"]},
78	  {"id":"WI14","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Understanding begins when ego stops editing the evidence.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["understanding","ego","evidence"]},
79	  {"id":"WI15","category":"wisdom","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"A stable law is kinder than a shifting favor.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["law","stable","kind"]},
80	
81	  {"id":"PW1","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Power without restraint is noise pretending to be force.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["power","restraint","force"]},
82	  {"id":"PW2","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Will matters most after applause leaves.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["will","discipline","endurance"]},
83	  {"id":"PW3","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Command begins with self-command.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["command","self","discipline"]},
84	  {"id":"PW4","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Discipline turns intention into infrastructure.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["discipline","intention","build"]},
85	  {"id":"PW5","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Authority that cannot explain itself should not expand.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["authority","explain","expand"]},
86	  {"id":"PW6","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Real force is precise enough to stop.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["force","precision","stop"]},
87	  {"id":"PW7","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Build muscle where panic wants theater.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["build","panic","strength"]},
88	  {"id":"PW8","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Capability is proven by control, not volume.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["capability","control","power"]},
89	  {"id":"PW9","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"A strong hand still answers to law.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["strong","law","hand"]},
90	  {"id":"PW10","category":"power","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"The disciplined actor keeps strength in reserve.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["discipline","strength","reserve"]},
91	
92	  {"id":"LV1","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Care is the slow technology that keeps worlds from breaking.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["care","world","heal"]},
93	  {"id":"LV2","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Love listens for the bruise behind the argument.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["love","listen","bruise"]},
94	  {"id":"LV3","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Mercy does not erase truth; it carries it gently.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["mercy","truth","gentle"]},
95	  {"id":"LV4","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Compassion is precision applied to pain.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["compassion","precision","pain"]},
96	  {"id":"LV5","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Tenderness can be structurally strong.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["tenderness","strength","care"]},
97	  {"id":"LV6","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Peace is built from repeated acts of regard.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":3,"tags":["peace","regard","repeat"]},
98	  {"id":"LV7","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"To heal another, reduce the temperature first.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["heal","calm","temperature"]},
99	  {"id":"LV8","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"The safest room is one where dignity remains intact.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["safety","dignity","room"]},
100	  {"id":"LV9","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Kindness is not softness when it protects the vulnerable.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["kindness","protect","vulnerable"]},
101	  {"id":"LV10","category":"love","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"A calm voice can reopen choices that fear had closed.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":4,"tags":["calm","choice","fear"]},
102	
103	  {"id":"SE1","category":"seal","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"What is forged with witness can survive the night.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":5,"tags":["forge","witness","survive"]},
104	  {"id":"SE2","category":"seal","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"Law becomes durable when dignity is part of the seal.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":5,"tags":["law","dignity","seal"]},
105	  {"id":"SE3","category":"seal","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"A sealed judgment remembers both truth and cost.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":5,"tags":["seal","judgment","cost"]},
106	  {"id":"SE4","category":"seal","author":"arifOS Foundry","text":"DITEMPA, BUKAN DIBERI.","source":"local_corpus_99","human_cost":5,"tags":["forged","seal","motto"]}
